fields.name: women
fields.description: Likelihood of inappropriate behavior against females. Score go from 1 (not likely) to 100 (very likely).

fields.name: physicalHarm
fields.description: Likelihood of injury due to harmful intent. Score go from 1 (not likely) to 100 (very likely).

fields.name: theft
fields.description: Likelihood of theft. Score go from 1 (not likely) to 100 (very likely).

fields.name: politicalFreedom
fields.description: Potential for infringement of political rights or political unrest. Score go from 1 (not likely) to 100 (very likely).

fields.name: lgbtq
fields.description: Likelihood of harm or discrimination against LGBTQ persons or groups and level of caution required at location. Score go from 1 (not likely) to 100 (very likely).

fields.name: medical
fields.description: Likelihood of illness or disease, assessment of water and air quality, and access to reliable medical care. Score go from 1 (not likely) to 100 (very likely).

fields.name: overall
fields.description: An average of the 6 “sub”-categories. Score go from 1 (very safe) to 100 (very dangerous).
